originalAlarm.description: Assigned value is garbage or undefined

reasoning: c708c57e247.c L18: known out-of-bounds array access (// ERROR). CSA reports 'Assigned value is garbage or undefined' from the out-of-bounds access. Known VBDB bug (same as TRANSFORMATION_77: TRUE). PC=CONFIG_S390_PRNG=T correctly constrains when this code path exists. No library macros.
